02
Path B — The Copywriting Seeker

I Specifically Want To Learn Copywriting And Start Making Money From It

That is a great starting point. Copywriting is one of the most valuable skills you can own — and this programme teaches it better than anything else available. But before you decide to stop at just copywriting, read what is below.

Copywriting alone is income. What you actually want is wealth. Income is just the starting fuel. The difference between where you are and where you want to be is a system — not just a skill.
The Bigger Picture

Why Learning A Skill Is Only Step One.

Most programmes teach you the skill and send you off. This one teaches you the skill — and then shows you exactly what to do with it to build something that lasts.

🛠️
Step 01

Skill As Service

You learn copywriting, offer creation, and marketing. You offer it to the market. People pay you. This is income — and income is the starting fuel, not the destination.

🏛️
Step 02

Income Builds Capital

You use your income wisely — invest it, compound it, build assets with it. This is capital. Capital is the engine. Most people skip this and stay trapped in the cycle of earning and spending.

🌍
Step 03

Capital Creates Wealth

When capital works for you — financial freedom, time freedom, legacy. This is wealth. Not a few good months. A life where money keeps building even when you are not actively working.

⚠️

Don't Make This Mistake

The moment a few good payments come in, most people develop what is called "arrival mentality" — they relax, they spend, they celebrate too early. And then they wonder why they are broke again. Your skill earns you money. But money is not wealth yet. It is capital waiting to be built. This programme teaches you both — how to earn it, and what to do with it so you never have to start from zero again. That is the real difference between income and freedom.

The System

C.O.M.B.A.T. — Six Pillars. One Identity.

Every letter is a real skill. Together they make you the most capable person in any room — and the most dangerous person in any market.

C
Copywriting
The words that move people. Not just writing — persuasion architecture built on copy-thinking, research, and real human psychology.
O
Offer
The construction that makes saying no almost impossible. This is what most copywriters never learn — and why their work keeps underperforming.
M
Marketing
Getting the right offer in front of the right people at the right time. Ads, funnels, formats, and the systems that sell while you sleep.
B
Business
Turning your skill into sustainable income. Pricing, clients, portfolio, and building beyond just trading your time for money.
A
Authority
Becoming the go-to, not just another option. Client acquisition, market positioning, and making the market come to you instead of chasing it.
T
Transformation
The mindset that makes every other pillar work. Before any skill — you must become someone who thinks differently. This is where the programme begins.
Who Belongs Here

You Are Ready If Any Of These Hit.

✦
You want to build real wealth — not just earn money

You understand the difference between income and freedom, and you want a system that takes you all the way.

✦

You've heard about copywriting and you want to learn it properly — from someone who actually does it professionally.

✦
You've taken courses and felt nothing change

Because those courses gave you information without giving you a complete system you can actually use in the real world.

✦
You run a business and your words aren't converting

You have a product or service but your messaging isn't moving people — and you want to understand exactly why and how to fix it.

✦
You feel like you are already behind

You see people making real money from their skills and you know you are capable of the same — you just haven't found the right system yet.

✦
You are willing to implement, not just consume

This programme is not for passive learners. It is for people who will do the work. If that is you — you are home.

What Is The Favour Plan?

The COMBAT System is ₦60,000 — that does not change. But CDT understands that not everyone has ₦60,000 ready at once, and no one should be locked out of a wealth-building education because of cash flow. So The Favour Plan lets you start with ₦20,000, access Tier 01 immediately, and pay the remaining tiers when you are ready. You start learning and earning now. The price of the system stays the same. Only the timing of how you pay it changes.

Questions & Answers

If You Are Thinking It, It Is Answered Here.

I don't know anything about copywriting. Is this still for me?
Yes — and this was built with you in mind. Part 0 handles the mindset before anything else. The course builds from the absolute ground up. You don't need experience. You need commitment.
I just want to learn copywriting — do I need the whole programme?
You can start with Foundation Tier and learn copywriting fully. But here is the honest truth — copywriting alone is income, not wealth. The full system is what takes you from skill to freedom. Start at Foundation. See the bigger picture. Then decide.
Can I pay the full ₦60,000 at once?
Yes — and that is the recommended way. Paying in full unlocks all three tiers immediately so you move through the entire system without interruption. Message CDT on WhatsApp to get the payment details.
What is The Favour Plan exactly?
The COMBAT System is ₦60,000. The Favour Plan lets you access it one tier at a time — starting with ₦20,000 — so cash flow never stops you from starting. The price doesn't change. Only the timing of payment does.
What is the Wealth Perspective section in Tier 03?
This is the section most programmes skip entirely. It teaches you what to do with the income your skill generates — how to turn it into capital, and how capital builds lasting wealth. Skill without this is just a better-paying job.
What is the Graduation Project?
You create a real digital product, sell it using paid ads, and build a community around it. A real business exercise — not a test. Top performers who complete it are eligible to be retained as CDT staff.
Will the price increase after prelaunch?
Yes. The ₦60,000 prelaunch price is locked in for early students only. When the course fully launches, the price goes up. Enrolling now locks your rate permanently.
How do I pay and access the course?
Click any enroll button. It opens a WhatsApp message directly to CDT. Payment details and access instructions come right after. The process takes minutes.
